explainers.2903.01: Aggravated murder: intentional killing with prior planning or specification.
explainers.2903.02: Murder: intentional killing of another person.
explainers.2903.13: Assault: attempting to cause physical harm or knowingly causing physical harm.
explainers.2913.02: Theft: obtaining property with purpose to deprive the owner of it.
explainers.2925.11: Possession of drugs: unlawful possession of a controlled substance.
explainers.4511.19: Operating a vehicle under the influence (OVI/DUI): driving while impaired by alcohol or drugs.
